parents.subject: LU-4458 test: take fail_val into account for pause_bulk()

commit.subject: LU-5968 mdt: return valid attribute only to client
commit.message:
LU-5968 mdt: return valid attribute only to client

In mdt_pack_attr2body(), it didn't check the valid bit of lu_attr.
This causes that clients see different file type.

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 testlist=racer

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtcount=1 testlist=racer

Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Change-Id: Iced5406d9398a38e5556e74bf839c15b06fa9e08
